raw_consumer_statement: I got bill from Macys store credit card in XXXX for a charge of {$2800.00} for which I didnt authorize. I called the credit card company to let them know that I didnt purchase those charges and that someone got a hold of my credit card information and used it. I told them to open a fraudulent investigation. I repeatedly called them time after to discuss about the fraudulent charges. I also wrote them a letter to Billing Error Division to look into this and to correct the errors made. But I kept receiving billing statements from them, pressuring me to pay. I need help in dealing this this situation.please look into this. Thank you for your time.
